core: purchases_backoffice: PO/receipt/invoice/returns with supplier settlement checks
pos_counter: open/close session, cashier operations, hold tickets, payments, cheque flow
cash_journal: movement log and totals by period/cashier/register
reporting_baseline: transactional prints and operational states
fiscal_baseline: connect/print command path and end-of-day report support
advanced: purchase history KPIs and top-client analytics
management dashboards and advanced query views
ui_middle_ground_rules: keep modern component and visual system
preserve legacy menu order and high-frequency workflow sequence
show legacy naming aliases where it reduces retraining cost
opt-in classic density for long-time operators
